lessons.title: Implement hybrid network infrastructure
lessons.content_md:
You learn to connect your on-premises environment to Azure, implement subnets and routing between your on-premises and cloud environments, and ensure that workloads in the cloud and on-premises perform DNS resolution to locate each other.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-network-infrastructure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement and operate an on-premises and hybrid networking infrastructure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement and operate an on-premises and hybrid networking infrastructure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
